title: Simple Electrum
description: Adds Silver and Electrum to Minecraft, providing an improved version of Gold tools.
body:
_Requires Fabric API_

Simple Electrum adds Silver ore to the Overworld and Nether, as well as Electrum ingots. The raw version of Electrum is crafted with raw Silver and raw Gold, which then can be smelted into ingots. Silver generates in similar quantities to Gold in both dimensions and can be crafted into armor and tools. Electrum can be crafted into tools with the same speed as gold, but with durability between stone and the same mining level as Iron.

![An image showing silver armor, silver and electrum tools, and other blocks and items included.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f617154bdaad3c98549853f8a433af402b436331.png)

Feel free to use this mod in a modpack! Every block and item is tagged for high compatibility.
